fingerprint.not-centered: Center your finger and try again
fingerprint.ready: Place your finger on the reader
fingerprint.remove-and-retry: Remove your finger and try again
fingerprint.swipe-too-short: Swipe was too short, try again

screenshot.confirm-region: Enter or Space to capture · Esc to cancel · Drag to reselect
screenshot.overlay-alloc-failed: Could not display the screenshot overlay (GPU out of video memory?)

confirm.clear-desc: Choose whether pinned items should be kept.
confirm.clear-desc-all-pinned: Every entry is pinned. Use Clear everything to remove them all.
confirm.clear-desc-no-pinned: This removes every entry from clipboard history.
confirm.delete-desc: This removes the selected item from clipboard history.

empty.history-message: No entries in the clipboard history.
empty.no-matches-message: No entries match the current filter.

audio.no-application-audio-body: No application playback streams are currently available.
audio.no-input-devices-body: No recording sources are currently available.
audio.no-output-devices-body: No playback sinks are currently available.

bluetooth.no-devices: No devices found. Start scanning to discover nearby Bluetooth devices.

pairing-detail.confirm: Confirm that this code matches the one shown on the device:
pairing-detail.display-passkey: Enter this code on the device:
pairing-detail.display-pin: Enter this PIN on the device:
pairing-detail.passkey: Enter the passkey shown on the device:
pairing-detail.pin-code: Enter the PIN shown on the device:

bluetooth.rfkill-blocked: Bluetooth is blocked by the system. Turn it on to clear the block.

media.start-playback: Start playback in an MPRIS app

network.unavailable-detail: Install and enable NetworkManager, wpa_supplicant, or iwd to manage networks from here.

screen-time.disabled: Screen time tracking is off. Enable it in Settings to record per-app usage.
screen-time.empty: No app usage recorded yet. Focus a window to start tracking.

weather.no-location-body: Add your address or enable auto-locate in Location settings.

errors.parse-ip-geolocation: Could not parse IP geolocation response

lockscreen.ready: Type your password and press Enter.

internal.battery-critical-body: {device}: {percent}% – your computer will shut down soon
internal.calendar-google-connect-browser-failed: No browser opener could be launched for Google authorization. Check your default browser or xdg-open setup.
internal.calendar-google-connect-expired: Google authorization expired before sign-in finished. Start the connection again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-missing-account: No configured Google calendar account matched "{account}".
internal.calendar-google-connect-rate-limited: Google authorization is temporarily rate limited. Wait a bit, then try again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-result-failed: Could not finish Google authorization. Start the connection again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-start-failed: Could not start Google authorization. Check your network connection and try again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-start-http: Could not start Google authorization. The OAuth broker returned HTTP {status}.
internal.calendar-google-connect-timeout: Google authorization timed out. Start the connection again when you are ready to sign in.
internal.config-migration-body: Legacy configuration is being migrated in memory, including {path}. Update the source configuration; Settings and noctalia config validate show the required replacement.
internal.desktop-widgets-editor-enabled: Desktop widget editor is on. Switch to an empty workspace to see the editor overlay.
internal.greeter-sync-pending: Waiting for administrator approval to write to the greeter.
internal.greeter-sync-pending-console: Waiting for administrator approval. Approve the polkit prompt in Noctalia, on a TTY or console, or run pkexec manually.
internal.greeter-sync-pending-manual: Files are staged. Run in a terminal: pkexec noctalia-greeter-apply-appearance "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/noctalia-greeter-sync". Or set shell.greeter_sync.privilege_command (for example ghostty -e pkexec) and sync again.
internal.greeter-sync-success: Appearance synced. Changes apply on the next login screen.
internal.greeter-sync-timeout: Greeter sync is still waiting for administrator approval. Check a TTY or console for a polkit prompt, enable the polkit agent in Security settings, or run pkexec manually.
internal.greeter-sync-timeout-manual: Greeter sync still needs administrator approval. Run in a terminal: pkexec noctalia-greeter-apply-appearance "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/noctalia-greeter-sync"
internal.keybind-invalid-modifier: This shortcut accepts a single key without modifiers.
internal.keybind-invalid-printable: Printable keys (letters, numbers, symbols) require a modifier such as Ctrl or Alt.
internal.keybind-invalid-super: The Super/Windows key cannot be used in shell keybinds.
internal.lockscreen-widgets-editor-blocked-locked: Unlock the session before editing lockscreen widgets.
internal.lockscreen-widgets-editor-enabled: Lockscreen widget editor is on. Arrange widgets on the preview overlay, then lock the session to verify the layout.
internal.polkit-no-session: Polkit agent needs logind, elogind, or XDG_SESSION_ID. On seatd-only setups it cannot register for graphical prompts. Use terminal pkexec for greeter sync, or install elogind for in-session authentication.
internal.wallpaper-palette-export-success: Saved "{name}" and switched palette source to custom.

auto-disabled.body-errors: {plugin} hit too many errors and was disabled. Reload it after fixing the issue.
auto-disabled.body-timeouts: {plugin} stopped responding and was disabled. Reload it after fixing the issue.
auto-disabled.title: Plugin disabled

enable-failed.body-incompatible: {plugin} targets plugin API {version}; this Noctalia supports API {oldest}–{current}.
enable-failed.title: Plugin not enabled

errors.lock-body: The session lock protocol is not available.

calendar-accounts.invalid: Check the highlighted calendar account fields.
calendar-accounts.password-keep-placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password
calendar-accounts.password-save-error: Could not save calendar account password.

bar.delete-confirm-desc: This GUI-created bar will be removed from settings.toml.
bar.label: Bar: {name}

monitor-override.delete-confirm-desc: This GUI-created monitor override will be removed from settings.toml.
monitor-override.label: Monitor: {name}

editor.description: Arrange widgets across the bar lanes
editor.title: Bar Widgets

group.border-description: Capsule outline color role; leave on Default for no outline
group.drawer-columns-description: Number of widgets per row in the drawer panel
group.drawer-detached-description: Open the drawer as a floating panel with its own background instead of merging with the bar
group.drawer-enabled-description: Move group widgets into a drawer panel toggled by a button
group.drawer-glyph-closed-description: Glyph shown on the drawer toggle button when the panel is closed
group.drawer-glyph-opened-description: Glyph shown on the drawer toggle button when the panel is open
group.fill-description: Capsule background color role; fixed hex colors are also supported
group.foreground-description: Icon and label color role for widgets in this group
group.padding-description: Inner padding between the capsule edge and its widgets, in pixels
group.radius-description: Capsule corner radius in pixels; Auto inherits the bar's capsule radius
group.title: Capsule group

instance.delete-confirm-desc: This named widget will be removed from every bar and its settings discarded.
instance.id-description: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens only. No spaces; must be unique.

lanes.empty-hint: Add a widget to populate this lane.

raw.description: Unsupported keys preserved from this widget config.
raw.title: Raw Settings

settings.empty: No settings match the current filters.

errors.avatar-accounts: Could not update the system account avatar.
errors.avatar-invalid-path: The selected avatar path is not a readable image file.
errors.avatar-load: Could not load the selected image. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, or SVG.
errors.avatar-write: Could not prepare the avatar image for saving.
errors.batch-write: Some settings could not be saved.
errors.custom-schedule-times: A custom schedule needs both a sunrise and a sunset time in HH:MM form.
errors.export-wallpaper-palette: Could not save the wallpaper palette as a custom palette.
errors.sync-greeter: Could not sync appearance to Noctalia Greeter.
errors.sync-greeter-timeout: Greeter sync is still waiting for administrator approval. Check a TTY or console for a polkit prompt, enable the polkit agent in Security settings, or run pkexec manually.
errors.sync-greeter-timeout-manual: Greeter sync still needs administrator approval. Run in a terminal: pkexec noctalia-greeter-apply-appearance "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/noctalia-greeter-sync"

export-config.full-effective-description: Exports every active setting, including built-in defaults. Useful for inspection or sharing a snapshot, but pins current defaults explicitly.
export-config.merged-user-description: Combines config files and GUI overrides into one TOML file. Built-in defaults stay implicit.
export-config.title: Export Config

filter.match-content-placeholder: Regex pattern to match summary or body…
filter.match-placeholder: App name, desktop entry, or category…

open-near-click.description: Position the panel near the bar widget that opened it; openings without a bar trigger are centered
open-near-click.label: Along Bar

placement.description: Attach the panel to the bar or float it near the bar edge
placement.label: Placement

position.description: Screen position when the panel is floating
position.label: Position

plugins.delete-confirm-desc: This plugin will be uninstalled and removed from disk.
plugins.title: Plugins

sources.auto-update-desc: Check enabled sources for new versions in the background and keep installed plugins current

errors.duplicate-name: A source with this ID already exists.
errors.invalid-name: Source ID must use letters, digits, '.', '_' or '-', starting with a letter or digit.

sources.precedence-hint: Lower sources override higher ones when they offer the same plugin.
sources.title: Sources

high-contrast.description: Increase contrast by pushing surface and background colors towards extreme values
high-contrast.label: High Contrast

app-icon-color.description: Palette color used when colorizing application icons
app-icon-color.label: App Icon Color

app-icon-colorize.description: Recolor application icons across the shell to match the active palette
app-icon-colorize.label: Colorize App Icons

builtin-palette.description: Choose a palette from the bundled catalog
builtin-palette.label: Built-In Palette

button-borders.description: Draw outlines around buttons throughout the shell
button-borders.label: Button Borders

community-palette.description: Choose a palette from the community catalog
community-palette.label: Community Palette

corner-roundness.description: Scale corner radius across shell UI containers and controls
corner-roundness.label: Corner Roundness

export-wallpaper-palette.description: Save the current wallpaper-generated palette as a reusable custom palette file
export-wallpaper-palette.label: Export Wallpaper Palette

font-family.description: Font family for the shell interface
font-family.label: Font Family

global-shadow-direction.description: Direction the shadow is cast from surfaces

input-borders.description: Draw outlines around text fields and other inputs throughout the shell
input-borders.label: Input Borders

palette-source.description: Where to derive the color palette from
palette-source.label: Palette Source

popup-borders.description: Draw outlines around popups and dropdowns
popup-borders.label: Popup Borders

popup-shadows.description: Draw drop shadows behind popups and dropdowns
popup-shadows.label: Popup Shadows

pure-black-dark.description: Anchor dark surfaces to true black, preventing banding on OLED panels (dark mode only)
pure-black-dark.label: Pure Black

theme-mode.description: Choose dark, light, or auto based on time of day
theme-mode.label: Theme Mode

ui-scale.description: Scale the entire interface up or down
ui-scale.label: UI Scale

wallpaper-generation-scheme.description: Choose how wallpaper colors are converted into a palette
wallpaper-generation-scheme.label: Wallpaper Generation Scheme

auto-hide.description: Off keeps the bar visible; On hides it until you move the pointer to the screen edge; Smart shows the bar on an empty workspace and hides it when windows are open

border.description: Color role for the bar outline; fixed hex colors are also supported
border.label: Border

border-width.description: Inside outline width for the bar
border-width.label: Border Width

capsule-border.description: Default capsule outline color role; fixed hex colors are also supported
capsule-border.label: Capsule Border

capsule-fill.description: Default capsule background color role; fixed hex colors are also supported
capsule-fill.label: Capsule Fill

capsule-foreground.description: Default icon and label color role inside capsules; fixed hex colors are also supported
capsule-foreground.label: Capsule Foreground

capsule-radius.description: Default corner radius for widget capsules, workspace pills, and taskbar workspace groups; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners
capsule-radius.label: Capsule Radius

capsule-thickness.description: Capsule size across the bar as a fraction of the bar thickness (1.0 fills the bar)
capsule-thickness.label: Capsule Thickness

center-widgets.description: Widgets in the center of the bar
center-widgets.label: Center Widgets

concave-edge-corners.description: Carve concave notches into two of the bar's corners (requires Edge Margin to be 0); with Ends Margin at 0, the corners on the bar's inner edge are carved, otherwise the corners touching the screen edge are carved
concave-edge-corners.label: Concave Edge Corners

contact-shadow.description: Dark gradient between an attached panel and the bar to suggest depth at the seam

content-padding.description: Padding inside the bar content area
content-padding.label: Content Padding

corner-bottom-left.description: Bottom left corner radius for the bar

corner-bottom-right.description: Bottom right corner radius for the bar

corner-top-left.description: Top left corner radius for the bar

corner-top-right.description: Top right corner radius for the bar

dead-zone-command.description: Shell command to run on left-click in the bar margin outside widget sections
dead-zone-command.label: Left Click

dead-zone-middle-command.description: Shell command to run on middle-click in the bar margin outside widget sections
dead-zone-middle-command.label: Middle Click

dead-zone-right-command.description: Shell command to run on right-click; leave empty to open Control Center
dead-zone-right-command.label: Right Click

dead-zone-scroll-down-command.description: Shell command to run when scrolling down
dead-zone-scroll-down-command.label: Scroll Down

dead-zone-scroll-up-command.description: Shell command to run when scrolling up
dead-zone-scroll-up-command.label: Scroll Up

edge-margin.description: Gap between the bar and the screen edge it sits on; set to 0 px to sit flush against that edge

end-widgets.description: Widgets on the end (right/bottom) side of the bar
end-widgets.label: End Widgets

ends-margin.description: Shortens the bar from both ends along its length; set to 0 px for a full-width or full-height bar

font-family.description: Typeface for this bar's widgets; leave empty to inherit the global font (per-widget Font Family overrides this)
font-family.label: Font Family

font-weight.description: Default weight for widget labels on this bar.
font-weight.label: Font Weight

hover-highlight.description: Softly tint the widget under the mouse pointer with its own foreground color
hover-highlight.label: Hover Highlight

layer.description: Use Overlay to show the bar above fullscreen apps; attached panels follow the bar
layer.label: Wayland Layer

opposite-edge-margin.description: Extra reserved space on the inward side of the bar, away from the screen edge; use when maximized windows ignore struts

panel-overlap.description: Pixels an attached panel overlaps the bar edge to hide the seam (adjust if you see a line or gap)
panel-overlap.label: Panel Overlap

position.description: Which screen edge the bar sits on

reserve-space.description: Push windows away from the bar edge

shadow.description: Cast the global surface shadow from the bar

show-on-workspace-switch.description: Briefly reveal the bar when the active workspace changes
show-on-workspace-switch.label: Show on Workspace Switch

start-widgets.description: Widgets on the start (left/top) side of the bar
start-widgets.label: Start Widgets

widget-color.description: Default icon and label color role for widgets on this bar; fixed hex colors are also supported
widget-color.label: Widget Color

widget-icon-color.description: Overrides the widget color for icons on this bar; fixed hex colors are also supported
widget-icon-color.label: Widget Icon Color

hot-corners-bottom-left.description: Action when the pointer hits the bottom left corner
hot-corners-bottom-left.label: Bottom Left Corner

hot-corners-bottom-left-command.description: Shell command to run when hitting the bottom left corner
hot-corners-bottom-left-command.label: Command

hot-corners-bottom-right.description: Action when the pointer hits the bottom right corner
hot-corners-bottom-right.label: Bottom Right Corner

hot-corners-bottom-right-command.description: Shell command to run when hitting the bottom right corner
hot-corners-bottom-right-command.label: Command

hot-corners-enabled.description: Trigger actions by pushing the mouse pointer into screen corners
hot-corners-enabled.label: Hot Corners

hot-corners-delay-ms.description: How long the pointer must stay in a corner before the action runs (0 = immediate)
hot-corners-delay-ms.label: Activation Delay

hot-corners-top-left.description: Action when the pointer hits the top left corner
hot-corners-top-left.label: Top Left Corner

hot-corners-top-left-command.description: Shell command to run when hitting the top left corner
hot-corners-top-left-command.label: Command

hot-corners-top-right.description: Action when the pointer hits the top right corner
hot-corners-top-right.label: Top Right Corner

hot-corners-top-right-command.description: Shell command to run when hitting the top right corner
hot-corners-top-right-command.label: Command

screen-corners-enabled.description: Round the screen corners with a black overlay
screen-corners-enabled.label: Screen Corners

screen-corners-size.description: Radius of the rounded screen corners in pixels
screen-corners-size.label: Corner Size

widgets-editor.description: Add, move, and resize desktop widgets
widgets-editor.label: Widget Editor

active-icon-opacity.description: Opacity of the focused dock icon
active-icon-opacity.label: Active Icon Opacity

active-icon-scale.description: Scale of the focused dock icon
active-icon-scale.label: Active Icon Scale

active-monitor-only.description: Only show applications running on the active monitor
active-monitor-only.label: Active Monitor Only

auto-hide.description: Off keeps the dock visible; On hides it until you move the pointer to the screen edge; Smart shows the dock on an empty workspace and hides it when windows are open

border.description: Color role for the dock outline; fixed hex colors are also supported
border.label: Border

border-width.description: Inside outline width for the dock
border-width.label: Border Width

concave-edge-corners.description: Carve inward corners on the side that touches the screen edge; requires the margin to the screen edge to be 0
concave-edge-corners.label: Concave Edge Corners

corner-bottom-left.description: Bottom left corner radius for the dock

corner-bottom-right.description: Bottom right corner radius for the dock

corner-top-left.description: Top left corner radius for the dock

corner-top-right.description: Top right corner radius for the dock

cross-axis-padding.description: Inner padding along the dock's cross axis (between icons and the screen edge)

edge-margin.description: Distance from the nearest screen edge; positive values float the dock away from it

ends-margin.description: Inset from each end of the dock along its main axis

icon-size.description: Size of dock icons in pixels
icon-size.label: Icon Size

launcher-custom-image.description: Use an image on the dock launcher button instead of an icon
launcher-custom-image.label: Launcher Custom Image

launcher-custom-image-colorize.description: Tint the custom image with the icon color
launcher-custom-image-colorize.label: Colorize Custom Image

launcher-icon.description: Tabler icon shown on the dock launcher button
launcher-icon.label: Launcher Icon

launcher-position.description: Show a launcher button at the start or end of the dock
launcher-position.label: Launcher Button

magnification.description: Magnify dock icons near the pointer, macOS-style
magnification.label: Magnification

magnification-scale.description: Maximum icon scale multiplier at the pointer center (1.0 disables magnification)
magnification-scale.label: Magnification Scale

main-axis-padding.description: Inner padding at the ends of the icon row (before the first and after the last icon)

monitors.description: Choose which monitors show the dock (leave empty for all); active-monitor filtering applies within these monitors
monitors.label: Monitors

pinned-apps.description: Desktop entry IDs of apps pinned to the dock
pinned-apps.label: Pinned Apps

position.description: Which screen edge the dock sits on

reserve-space.description: Push windows away from the dock edge

shadow.description: Cast the global surface shadow from the dock

show-dots.description: Show running window dots below dock icons
show-dots.label: Show Dots

show-instance-count.description: Show a badge with the number of open instances
show-instance-count.label: Show Instance Count

show-running.description: Show running applications that are not pinned
show-running.label: Show Running

battery-charging.description: Command to run when the battery starts charging
battery-charging.label: On Battery Charging

battery-discharging.description: Command to run when the battery starts discharging
battery-discharging.label: On Battery Discharging

battery-percentage-changed.description: Command to run when the battery percentage changes
battery-percentage-changed.label: On Battery Percentage Changed

battery-plugged.description: Command to run when the battery becomes fully charged or pending charge
battery-plugged.label: On Battery Plugged

bluetooth-disabled.description: Command to run when Bluetooth is disabled
bluetooth-disabled.label: On Bluetooth Disabled

bluetooth-enabled.description: Command to run when Bluetooth is enabled
bluetooth-enabled.label: On Bluetooth Enabled

colors-changed.description: Command to run when the active color palette changes
colors-changed.label: On Colors Changed

logging-out.description: Command to run before logging out
logging-out.label: On Logout

power-profile-changed.description: Command to run when the active UPower/PPD power profile changes
power-profile-changed.label: On Power Profile Changed

session-locked.description: Command to run when the session is locked
session-locked.label: On Session Locked

session-unlocked.description: Command to run after the session is unlocked
session-unlocked.label: On Session Unlocked

started.description: Command to run after Noctalia starts
started.label: On Started

theme-mode-changed.description: Command to run when the resolved theme mode changes between light and dark
theme-mode-changed.label: On Theme Mode Changed

wallpaper-changed.description: Command to run when the wallpaper changes; provides NOCTALIA_WALLPAPER_PATH and NOCTALIA_WALLPAPER_CONNECTOR
wallpaper-changed.label: On Wallpaper Changed

wifi-disabled.description: Command to run when Wi-Fi is disabled
wifi-disabled.label: On Wi-Fi Disabled

wifi-enabled.description: Command to run when Wi-Fi is enabled
wifi-enabled.label: On Wi-Fi Enabled

behaviors.description: Named idle actions with presets (lock, screen off, suspend) or custom commands, timeouts, resume pairing, and order
behaviors.label: Behaviors

pre-action-fade.description: Seconds of fullscreen dim before the idle command (0 disables)
pre-action-fade.label: Idle Dim

cancel.description: Close popups, dismiss panels, or abort the current operation
cancel.label: Cancel

down.description: Move focus or selection down one row
down.label: Navigate Down

left.description: Move focus or selection to the left
left.label: Navigate Left

right.description: Move focus or selection to the right
right.label: Navigate Right

tab-next.description: Move focus to the next control
tab-next.label: Focus Next

tab-previous.description: Move focus to the previous control
tab-previous.label: Focus Previous

up.description: Move focus or selection up one row
up.label: Navigate Up

validate.description: Confirm selections, submit inputs, or activate the focused item
validate.label: Confirm

allow-empty-password.description: Let Enter submit an empty password (enable for security-key or other passwordless PAM stacks; keep off to avoid accidental wake-key lockouts)
allow-empty-password.label: Empty Password Submit

blur-intensity.description: How much the lock screen background is blurred
blur-intensity.label: Blur Intensity

blurred-desktop.description: Use a snapshot of the desktop as the lock screen background
blurred-desktop.label: Desktop Capture

enabled.description: Enable session lock, logind integration, and lock actions
enabled.label: Lock Screen

fingerprint.description: Unlock with a fingerprint reader via fprintd, alongside password entry
fingerprint.label: Fingerprint Unlock

monitors.description: Choose which monitors show the lock screen; leave empty to show on all monitors
monitors.label: Monitors

tint-intensity.description: Surface-color tint over the lock screen background
tint-intensity.label: Tint Intensity

wallpaper.description: Custom image for the lock screen background; leave empty to use the desktop wallpaper
wallpaper.label: Wallpaper

widgets.description: Show configurable widgets on the lock screen
widgets.label: Lockscreen Widgets

widgets-editor.description: Add, move, and resize widgets on the lock screen
widgets-editor.label: Lockscreen Widget Editor

allowed-urgencies.description: Only show external notifications at the selected urgency levels
allowed-urgencies.label: Allowed Urgencies

blacklist.description: Hide matching senders (app name, desktop entry, or category)
blacklist.label: Notification Blacklist

blacklist-allow-critical.description: Still show critical notifications from blacklisted senders

border.description: Draw an outline around notification toasts
border.label: Border

collapse-on-dismiss.description: Slide remaining toasts to close gaps when one is dismissed
collapse-on-dismiss.label: Collapse on Dismiss

filters.description: Per-sender rules for toasts, history, and sounds; first matching enabled filter wins
filters.label: Notification Filters

layer.description: Use Overlay to show notification toasts above fullscreen apps
layer.label: Wayland Layer

monitors.description: Choose which monitors show notification toasts; leave empty to show on all monitors
monitors.label: Monitors

offset-x.description: Absolute horizontal margin from the screen or bar edge
offset-x.label: Horizontal Margin

offset-y.description: Absolute vertical margin from the screen or bar edge
offset-y.label: Vertical Margin

scale.description: Scale notification toasts relative to the shell UI scale
scale.label: Size

show-actions.description: Show action buttons in notification toasts; when disabled, clicking the toast triggers its default action
show-actions.label: Show Action Buttons

show-app-name.description: Show the sending application's name in notification toasts
show-app-name.label: Show App Name

borders.description: Draw an outline on panels and section cards inside panels
borders.label: Borders

control-center-sidebar.description: Choose how to display the sidebar
control-center-sidebar.label: Sidebar

control-center-sidebar-section.description: When opening a specific tab (volume, media etc.)
control-center-sidebar-section.label: Sidebar When Opening a Tab

control-center-tabs.description: Choose which tabs appear in the control center; unchecked tabs are hidden
control-center-tabs.label: Control Center Tabs

control-center-width.description: Width of the control center panel in pixels (compact and no-sidebar modes scale down from this)
control-center-width.label: Control Center Width

floating-offset.description: Gap in pixels between a floating or detached panel and the bar edge
floating-offset.label: Floating Offset

home-shortcuts.description: Choose up to six shortcut buttons for the home tab
home-shortcuts.label: Home Shortcuts

launcher-app-grid.description: Show a grid of application icons with labels underneath when results are apps only
launcher-app-grid.label: App Grid View

launcher-categories.description: Display category filters in the launcher; reveal with F6, then cycle with F6 and Shift+F6
launcher-categories.label: Show Categories

launcher-compact.description: Use smaller icons and tighter result rows
launcher-compact.label: Compact Rows

launcher-currency-exchange.description: Fetch rates from third party online sources
launcher-currency-exchange.label: Currency Exchange Conversion

launcher-global-calculator.description: Also show calculator results in unprefixed search
launcher-global-calculator.label: Calculator in Global Search

launcher-global-emoji.description: Also show emoji results in unprefixed search
launcher-global-emoji.label: Emoji in Global Search

launcher-global-session.description: Also show session actions in unprefixed search
launcher-global-session.label: Session in Global Search

launcher-global-wallpaper.description: Also show wallpapers in unprefixed search
launcher-global-wallpaper.label: Wallpaper in Global Search

launcher-global-windows.description: Also show open windows in unprefixed search
launcher-global-windows.label: Windows in Global Search

launcher-prefix-character.description: Common prefix character used to trigger all provider prefixes (e.g. /)
launcher-prefix-character.label: Common Prefix Character

launcher-prefix-session.description: Trigger prefix for session power actions
launcher-prefix-session.label: Session Prefix

launcher-reset-usage.description: Clear launch counts and recently used history used for launcher sorting
launcher-reset-usage.label: Reset Usage Data

launcher-session-search.description: Include session actions (lock, suspend, reboot, shutdown, logout) in general launcher searches, not only behind the /session prefix
launcher-session-search.label: Enable Session Search

launcher-show-icons.description: Show application icons in launcher results
launcher-show-icons.label: Show App Icons

launcher-sort-by-usage.description: Boost frequently used apps toward the top and show a Recently Used category filter
launcher-sort-by-usage.label: Sort by Usage
